children.label: A
children.text: payment of premiums and coverage; and

children.label: B
children.text: payment for supplemental prescription drug benefits,

children.label: A
children.text: Enrollment file sharing.

children.label: B
children.text: The processing of claims, including electronic processing.

children.label: C
children.text: Claims payment.

children.label: D
children.text: Claims reconciliation reports.

children.label: E
children.text: Application of the protection against high out-of-pocket expenditures under .section 1395w–102(b)(4) of this title

children.label: F
children.text: Other administrative processes specified by the Secretary.

children.heading: Use of lump sum per capita method
children.label: 3 Use of lump sum per capita method
children.text: Such requirements shall include a method for the application by a part D plan of specified funding amounts from a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program for enrolled individuals for supplemental prescription drug benefits.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: 4 Consultation
children.text: In establishing requirements under this subsection, the Secretary shall consult with State Pharmaceutical Assistance Programs, MA organizations, States, pharmaceutical benefit managers, employers, representatives of part D eligible individuals, the data processing experts, pharmacists, pharmaceutical manufacturers, and other experts.

children.heading: Part D plan defined
children.label: 5 Part D plan defined
children.text: For purposes of this section and , the term “part D plan” means a prescription drug plan and an MA–PD plan.section 1395w–134 of this title
which provides financial assistance for the purchase or provision of supplemental prescription drug coverage or benefits on behalf of part D eligible individuals;

which, in determining eligibility and the amount of assistance to part D eligible individuals under the Program, provides assistance to such individuals in all part D plans and does not discriminate based upon the part D plan in which the individual is enrolled; and
which satisfies the requirements of subsections (a) and (c).

children.heading: Medicare as primary payor
children.label: 1 Medicare as primary payor
children.text: The requirements of this section shall not change or affect the primary payor status of a part D plan.

children.heading: Use of a single card
children.label: 2 Use of a single card
children.text: A card that is issued under for use under a part D plan may also be used in connection with coverage of benefits provided under a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program and, in such case, may contain an emblem or symbol indicating such connection.section 1395w–104(b)(2)(A) of this title

children.heading: Other provisions
children.label: 3 Other provisions
children.text: The provisions of shall apply to the requirements under this section.section 1395w–134(c) of this title

children.heading: Special treatment under out-of-pocket rule
children.label: 4 Special treatment under out-of-pocket rule
children.text: In applying , expenses incurred under a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program may be counted toward the annual out-of-pocket threshold.section 1395w–102(b)(4)(C)(ii) of this title

children.heading: Construction
children.label: 5 Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed as requiring a State Pharmaceutical Assistance Program to coordinate or provide financial assistance with respect to any part D plan.

children.heading: Facilitation of transition and coordination with State Pharmaceutical Assistance Programs
children.label: d Facilitation of transition and coordination with State Pharmaceutical Assistance Programs

children.heading: Transitional grant program
children.label: 1 Transitional grant program
children.text: The Secretary shall provide payments to State Pharmaceutical Assistance Programs with an application approved under this subsection.

children.label: A
children.text: Educating part D eligible individuals enrolled in the Program about the prescription drug coverage available through part D plans under this part.

children.label: B
children.text: Providing technical assistance, phone support, and counseling for such enrollees to facilitate selection and enrollment in such plans.

children.label: C
children.text: Other activities designed to promote the effective coordination of enrollment, coverage, and payment between such Program and such plans.

children.heading: Allocation of funds
children.label: 3 Allocation of funds
children.text: Of the amount appropriated to carry out this subsection for a fiscal year, the Secretary shall allocate payments among Programs that have applications approved under paragraph (4) for such fiscal year in proportion to the number of enrollees enrolled in each such Program as of .October 1, 2003

children.heading: Application
children.label: 4 Application
children.text: No payments may be made under this subsection except pursuant to an application that is submitted and approved in a time, manner, and form specified by the Secretary.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: 5 Funding
children.text: Out of any funds in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, there are appropriated for each of fiscal years 2005 and 2006, $62,500,000 to carry out this subsection.
